current_run.description: Given an N-bit integer x, a secret integer `s` in the range [0, 2^N - 1], and a secret integer `t` in the range [0, N-1], the oracle computes 1 if the majority of the bits in `x` are 1 in the positions indicated by the set bits of `s`, and the result is also equal to the (t+1)-th bit of `x`. Otherwise, it computes 0. The goal is to find `s` and `t`.
